chosen_action.title: Make evaluator comparison pages Codeberg-first with visible GitHub mirror proof

why_this_action.summary: The freshest audit still had an unexecuted repair: ensure all public-facing content links Codeberg as primary and GitHub as mirror. The alternative/comparison pages are high-intent evaluator surfaces already aimed at competitor-aware visitors, so tightening the repo CTA there was the highest-leverage executable move that did not overlap the paused directory or curator lanes.
shared_findings_used: agents/marketing/logs/adoption_metrics_latest.json: Codeberg remains the primary success metric and is flat
agents/marketing/logs/distribution_lane_latest.json: skip same-family directory and curator bursts
agents/marketing/logs/market_intelligence_latest.json: reuse competitor comparison surfaces already mapped
agents/marketing/FOUR_MARKETING_QUESTIONS.md: preserve what/for whom/why different/why now framing

verification.live_fetch: web fetch of /claude-code-alternative confirmed the new 'Inspect the public code first' section and Codeberg-first language after deploy

expected_outcome.goal: Increase the share of high-intent comparison-page visitors who inspect the primary Codeberg repo instead of drifting into generic docs-only browsing or mirror-first evaluation.
expected_outcome.success_metric: Alternative-page visitors see an explicit Codeberg-first CTA and eventual Codeberg traffic/adoption movement improves before the next replacement checkpoint.
expected_outcome.replacement_condition: If Codeberg still shows no movement by 2026-06-07, treat this conversion repair as insufficient on its own and switch the next fresh run to a different demand-capture or third-party citation lane instead of another comparison-page-only pass.
